mapper.insert: INSERT INTO xeus.eocs_excavator( _gid, cont_name, rec_date, job_type, rec_no, cont_type, work_name, start_sido, start_gu, start_dong, start_lotnum, start_lotsubnum, start_addr, start_lon, start_lat, exstart_date, end_sido, end_gu, end_dong, end_lotnum, end_lotsubnum, end_addr, end_lon, end_lat, exend_date, _annox, _annoy, _geometry, update_date) VALUES ( #{mgrNo}::numeric, #{contName}, #{recDate}, #{jobType}, #{recNo}, #{contType}, #{workName}, #{startSido}, #{startGu}, #{startDong}, #{startLotnum}, #{startLotsubnum}, #{startAddr}, #{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric, #{exstartDate}, #{endSido}, #{endGu}, #{endDong}, #{endLotnum}, #{endLotsubnum}, #{endAddr}, #{endLon}::numeric, #{endLat}::numeric, #{exendDate}, st_x(ST_Transform(st_setsrid(ST_makepoint(#{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric),4326),5186)), st_y(ST_Transform(st_setsrid(ST_makepoint(#{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric),4326),5186)), ST_Transform(st_setsrid(ST_makepoint(#{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric),4326),5186), TO_CHAR(now(), 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') );
mapper.select: SELECT _gid as mgr_no, cont_name, rec_date, job_type, rec_no, cont_type, work_name, start_sido, start_gu, start_dong, start_lotnum, start_lotsubnum, start_addr, start_lon, start_lat, exstart_date, end_sido, end_gu, end_dong, end_lotnum, end_lotsubnum, end_addr, end_lon, end_lat, exend_date, _annox, _annoy, update_date FROM ( SELECT *, ST_Distance( ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(start_lon, start_lat), 4326), 5186)::geography, ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(end_lon, end_lat), 4326), 5186)::geography ) AS dist_val FROM xeus.eocs_excavator ) AS sub WHERE ST_Contains( ST_Buffer( _geometry, CASE WHEN dist_val <= 5 OR dist_val >= 500 THEN 10 ELSE dist_val END ), ST_Transform(ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(#{x}::numeric, #{y}::numeric), 4326), 5186) ) LIMIT 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE xeus.eocs_excavator
start_lon = #{startLon}::numeric,
start_lon = NULL,
start_lat = #{startLat}::numeric,
start_lat = NULL,
end_lon = #{endLon}::numeric,
end_lon = NULL,
end_lat = #{endLat}::numeric,
end_lat = NULL,
_annox = st_x(ST_Transform(st_setsrid(ST_makepoint(#{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric),4326),5186)), _annoy = st_y(ST_Transform(st_setsrid(ST_makepoint(#{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric),4326),5186)), _geometry = ST_Transform(st_setsrid(ST_makepoint(#{startLon}::numeric, #{startLat}::numeric),4326),5186),
_annox = NULL, _annoy = NULL, _geometry = NULL,
WHERE rec_no = #{recNo}
